name: Lemon Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. From the lemon, grate 1 tablespoon peel and squeeze out 3 tablespoons of juice.
2. In a double boiler over hot (not boiling) water, or in a heavy 2-quart saucepan over low heat, stir together the lemon juice, lemon peel, butter or margarine, and sugar until the butter melts.
3. In a small bowl, beat the eggs slightly.
4. Add the beaten eggs to the butter mixture and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is very thick and coats the back of a spoon well (about 15 minutes). Do not boil the mixture, or it will curdle.
5. Refrigerate the lemon curd until set.
